rune.runeenchanting.air_affinity.descrip: Negates the mining speed penalty when off ground
rune.runeenchanting.aqua_affinity.descri: Negates the mining speed penalty when underwater
rune.runeenchanting.bane_of_hissing.desc: Increases damage dealt to hissing creatures
rune.runeenchanting.bane_of_noses.descri: Increases damage dealt to long nosed creatures
rune.runeenchanting.blast_protection.des: Reduces damage and knockback taken by explosions
rune.runeenchanting.blasting.description: Increases mining speed. The lower the explosion resistance of the block, the higher the mining speed
rune.runeenchanting.channeling.descripti: Summon a lightning bolt on entity or lightning rod hit
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_binding.des: Prevents the item from being unequipped
rune.runeenchanting.depth_strider.descri: Reduces the movement speed reduction that occurs when in water
rune.runeenchanting.dwarfing.description: Increases mining speed. The deeper you mine, the higher the mining speed
rune.runeenchanting.earthbend.descriptio: Increases mining speed for blocks that don't require a tool
rune.runeenchanting.fire_protection.desc: Reduces damage taken by lava and fire and reduces time on fire
rune.runeenchanting.flame.description: Sets the entity or arrows on fire
rune.runeenchanting.frost_walker.descrip: Create ice when walking near water
rune.runeenchanting.impaling.description: Increases damage dealt to creatures touched by water or rain
rune.runeenchanting.infinity.description: Chance to not consume an arrow when using a bow
rune.runeenchanting.knockback.descriptio: Increases knockback of weapons and arrows
rune.runeenchanting.loyalty.description: Return the trident to the owner
rune.runeenchanting.luck.description: Increases yield from blocks mined, entities killed and fishing
rune.runeenchanting.lure.description: Lowers the time it takes to lure fish
rune.runeenchanting.magic_protection.des: Reduces damage taken by magic attacks and decreases the duration of negative effects
rune.runeenchanting.melee_protection.des: Reduces damage taken by melee attacks and increases attack speed
rune.runeenchanting.piercing.description: Arrows will pass through multiple entities
rune.runeenchanting.power.description: Increases damage dealt by the arrow
rune.runeenchanting.projectile_protectio: Reduces damage taken by projectiles and mobs sight
rune.runeenchanting.recovery.description: Recover some health back overtime when attacked
rune.runeenchanting.respiration.descript: Increases the time you can breathe underwater
rune.runeenchanting.riptide.description: Throw yourself instead of the trident and deal damage on contact
rune.runeenchanting.smite.description: Increases damage dealt to undead creatures
rune.runeenchanting.soul_speed.descripti: Speed up walking on soul blocks
rune.runeenchanting.sprint_pact.descript: Increased movement speed but can no longer sprint
rune.runeenchanting.vindication.descript: Stack damage taken and deal it back with the next attack
rune.runeenchanting.water_coolant.descri: Increases damage dealt to water sensitive creatures
